description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rtlong/docker Docker image globally and runs a docker:1.12.1-dind service, with a cache directory at /tmp/docker-cache and a variable DOCKER_CACHE_DIR set to that path. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the ruby:2.3.1 image, runs only on the master branch, and sets up a staging environment named "staging" with URL https://stay-woke-catalyst.herokuapp.com/. The deploy job's script runs gem install dpl then dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY --strategy='git ssh'. No artifacts or additional triggers are defined.
